name: github_list_user_copilot_spaces
description: List Copilot Spaces for a user (GET /users/{username}/copilot-spaces). Cursor pagination via before/after/per_page; supports all_pages/max_pages. Returns spaces array. See [List Copilot Spaces for a user](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/copilot-spaces?apiVersion=2026-03-10#list-copilo
